# ona_organization_role_assignment (List Resource)

Lists supported Ona organization role assignments.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_organization_role_assignment" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group_id` (String) Group ID receiving the role.
- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID to query. Defaults to the authenticated organization.
- `role` (String) Supported organization role to include.
